delta_from_prior_review.v4_fix1_note: PKR correctly carved out from fast office-seeking template; durability framing defensible per PKR's own history (founded 4 April 1999 from Reformasi wave) and IPU records (5 seats in 1999; in government after 2018 PH victory). Bersatu and GRS correctly remain inside the fast-pivot frame.
delta_from_prior_review.v4_fix2_note: DAP/Gerakan timeline factually correct. DAP's own history: formed October 1965, registered 18 March 1966. Gerakan's own history: founded 24 March 1968. 1969 correctly framed as electoral breakthrough year.

overall_assessment: The dossier is now factually publication-ready. The two v4 blockers have been corrected: PKR is no longer wrongly grouped with the fast defector-pivot cases, and DAP/Gerakan are no longer presented as 1969 launches. The remaining analytical architecture is defensible, with Bersatu and GRS properly treated as fast office-seeking exceptions and PKR properly treated as a durability exception. I found no residual cardinal factual error requiring another pre-publication fix.
